name: Jiujiuwang Food International Limited
summary: Jiujiuwang Food International Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells confectionary products. It offers aerated candies, gum-based candies, hard candies, tablet candies, and chocolate-made products. The company sells its products under Coolsa, Lalabo, and Jiujiuwang brands to distributors and end-consumers through e-commerce channels; and brands owned or licensed by OEM customers. It operates in the People's Republic of China, rest if Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jinjiang, China.
